text: an oven is an appliance or chamber used to heat, bake, roast, or cook food
original_text: An oven is an appliance or chamber used to heat, bake, roast, or cook food.

text: ovens can use gas, electricity, wood, or other heat sources
original_text: Ovens can use gas, electricity, wood, or other heat sources.

text: an oven surrounds food with hot air or radiant heat
original_text: An oven surrounds food with hot air or radiant heat.

text: ovens are used for bread, pizza, casseroles, roasted vegetables, and many other foods
original_text: Ovens are used for bread, pizza, casseroles, roasted vegetables, and many other foods.

text: the meatball respects ovens as portals of transformation
original_text: The meatball respects ovens as portals of transformation.
